title: Better Carpets
description: Turn carpets into functional floor blocks that allow placing torches, buttons and other blocks on top.
body:
# Better Carpets

Better Carpets adds the **Carpet Duster**, a tool that upgrades carpets into functional carpet blocks.

These enhanced carpets keep the appearance of both the carpet and the block underneath, while allowing players to place blocks that normally require a solid floor.

## Features

• Right-click a carpet with the **Carpet Duster** to convert it into an enhanced carpet block  
• Place torches, buttons, pressure plates and other blocks on carpets  
• Right-click again to restore the original block and carpet  
• Carpet blocks inherit properties from the base block  
• Works with most solid blocks  
• Falling blocks (sand, gravel) drop the carpet and fall normally  

---

## Design decision

Enhanced carpet blocks intentionally **do not interact with pistons**.

This prevents inconsistent behaviour and keeps the mechanic predictable.

---

## Requirements

Minecraft **1.21.1**  
Loader: **NeoForge**

---

## Crafting

Use the Carpet Duster to upgrade carpets.

![Carpet Duster ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9bda7eb8cd6224ba5ae0177f72e61a14b7d15dd.png)

---

## Example uses

• Decorated floors without losing functionality  
• Hidden redstone under carpets  
• Better interior building  
• Cleaner base design  

---

## Compatibility

Works with most solid blocks in the game.

## Feedback & Support

You can DM me on Discord (@wkgkfn) for:
- bug reports
- suggestions
